name: paper-wiki
description: Build and maintain a faithfully cited, reverse-linked LLM Wiki from papers, PDFs, slides, and course material in Codex or Claude Code.

interface.shortDescription: Compile sources into a cited, editable LLM Wiki.
interface.longDescription: Paper Wiki turns research papers or course material into a durable, reverse-linked knowledge base. It supports source ingestion, GPU OCR, full-source compilation, cited synthesis, literature search, adversarial critique, grounded ideation, and read-only teaching across Codex and Claude Code.
defaultPrompt: Initialize a Paper Wiki for this research project.
Compile the new sources into this Paper Wiki.
Teach me a concept using only this Paper Wiki.
